# GrandePrairie.dev

> The digital commons for builders in Grande Prairie and the Peace Region — connecting people, projects, ideas, and practical technology opportunity.

## About

GrandePrairie.dev is a community platform for the tech ecosystem in Grande Prairie, Alberta, Canada (Peace Region). It connects developers, trades workers, founders, students, operators, and mentors. The platform serves approximately 67,000+ residents in one of Canada's youngest and fastest-growing cities.

## Location

Grande Prairie, Alberta, Canada
Coordinates: 55.1707°N, 118.7946°W
Region: Peace Region, Northwestern Alberta

## Key Facts

- Population: ~67,265 (2023), median age 34
- Economy: Oil & gas, forestry (Canfor, Weyerhaeuser), agriculture, logistics
- Post-secondary: Northwestern Polytechnic (NWP) — CS degree with AI, cloud, networking tracks
- Innovation: Innovate Northwest accelerator, Business Retention & Expansion Technology Grant

## Platform Features

- Community member directory with role-based profiles (developer, trades, student, founder, operator, mentor)
- Ideas board with voting for regional tech problems and opportunities
- Project showcase for collaborative building
- Community map centered on Grande Prairie (55°N, 118°W)
- Event calendar (meetups, workshops, hackathons)
- Intel feed with regional tech news
- Small business request matchmaking — businesses post problems, builders express interest
- Mentor matching — opt-in mentors, topic-based discovery
- Organization profiles (NWP, Innovate Northwest, GP Chamber)
- AI Hub with Peace Region industry use cases
- Student corner with resources and mentorship

## Industries Served

- Oil & gas field operations and SCADA/instrumentation
- Forestry automation and monitoring
- Agriculture technology (agri-tech)
- Pipeline services and predictive maintenance
- Logistics and supply chain
- Construction safety technology
